title: Italian Wonton Soup
description: A fusion twist on traditional wonton soup, incorporating Italian flavors. Shrimp and wonton dumplings are served in a light, savory broth.
instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot over high heat.
Add the white wine and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the soup has thickened slightly.
While the soup is cooking, prepare the wontons by placing a small spoonful of the shrimp mixture in the center of each wonton wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with a little water, then fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the wonton.
When the soup is ready, add the wontons and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Season the soup with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
